name: frontier_port
description: Battle Port hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane), MANAGER-OWNED CREW RECUT (FrontierManager 2026-07-19): the rival pair (Captain Stern + Sailor Crest) now fights as ONE GEN_9_MULTI 2v2 - player + Deckhand Maru (rctmod:port_deckhand) vs both challengers - dispatched by Stern's 'Muster the crew - 2v2' button (cobblemon-initiative frontier port crew). Crest has NO battle path; his dialog redirects to the muster. The manager owns the win: '[Frontier] Purse paid: 1500 CD' chat + BOTH defeated_port_challenger_* tags in one stroke (no character win_lines - those moved to the beaten entries). The crew fight is UNLOCKED/REAL (no level flatten) - the wonder team carries it. Then Port Admiral Horatio exactly as before: dialog-owned do:battle (button 'Challenge Admiral Horatio' gated all_tags on both defeats, which the manager set), on_win runs frontier/hall_cleared and tags frontier_port_cleared. Horatio is the ONE GEN_9_DOUBLES brain in this wave - two conscious mons on the player's side are load-bearing. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery (royal_league_champion - gate.champion lowers to that player tag); stripped in cleanup. The Port trio shares the cluster with the co-located market group (~5b apart) - full display-name needles keep matches unique; NEVER shorten 'Captain Stern' (the 'Stern' stem is a substring of 'Market Mogul Sterling'). Site is inside the frontier_active region-tick AABB (Nuzlocke faint paths suspended - 'nothing of yours goes down'); atlas re-survey open, hence _probe_pending. KNOWN CAVEAT: intermittent TBCS battle-init stall / rare showdown wedge - a win-wait timeout is almost certainly that, not a hall regression; re-run before filing (the manager's 100-tick capture watchdog prints 'The fight failed to take the floor' on the stall - that line in the log IS the diagnosis).

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, sweep a stale battle --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep + the 40b latches spawn Stern/Crest/Horatio on a fresh world). Coordinate is the shipped RCT pier line (ch1 3785.5 / ch2 3791.5 at z2990.5, brain 3788.5 z2996.5), stood 2b north - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or its battles set, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the bodies persist and are never killed here --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared --
-- party reset: junk parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live). Empty all six slots, then 2x lv-100 Garchomp - two mons REQUIRED for Horatio's doubles format --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle).

cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 — every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

-- leaked-battle sweep (2026-07-19): an aborted prior scenario can leave a live battle + a dead manager dispatch entry; stopbattle ends the battle (harmless no-op when clean) and the sleep lets the Java self-heal clear the dead dispatch (~2s) before the first hall command --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: the crew muster. Stern's dialog carries the ONE fight button for the pair - 'Muster the crew - 2v2' dispatches cobblemon-initiative frontier port crew (manager-owned GEN_9_MULTI: player + Deckhand Maru vs Stern + Crest). say[] rotates, so the screen assert targets the stable button label (its rendering IS the champion-gate assert) --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
defensive: the muster button DOES carry a do:close, but a lingering screen eats the next interact if the close races the command (live-caught idiom, kept)
FrontierManager.portCrew dispatch announce (Java chat) - fires synchronously with the muster command, before the MULTI takes the floor

the manager's win signal ('[Frontier] Purse paid: 1500 CD.') - there is NO character win_line on manager fights. The MULTI is unlocked/REAL (four hulls, no flatten) so it runs long; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall / capture watchdog ('The fight failed to take the floor'), not a hall regression
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)
BOTH tags from the one crew win (onFightWon port_crew special-case) - this pair opening is the whole contract of the manager fight
battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Port Admiral Horatio, the deep berth - dialog-owned DOUBLES, UNCHANGED by the manager recut. His button gates all_tags on both challenger defeats (set by the crew win) - it rendering now IS the ladder assert. Win chain: prize -> frontier_port_cleared tag -> win say -> frontier/hall_cleared (actionbar) --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
doubles at the ceiling runs longer than the singles halls - widest win window of the wave
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)

steps.comment: -- beat 3: cleared-state dialog - Horatio's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_port_cleared) preempts; prose any-of covers both rotating say lines (the late-tier recognition beat included) --

expect_screen_text: You took the deep water off me, Champion. I ran this dock when the Company still built for wonder instead of the ledger - and I know the face that dedicated it. I keep that to myself. Fair seas out past the halls.
The Port is yours. The rain, the swell, the whole gauntlet. Whatever you were before you washed up here, you earned the harbor honestly - that is more than most.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD prizes ride (the prize rail has no reset) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
